title: Training Composer 2
summary: Composer 2 is an AI coding assistant built on the Kimi K2.5 base model with 256K context. The model is trained via continued pre-training on coding tasks followed by long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install capabilities, using reward shaping and self-summarization techniques. Training is evaluated on Cursor Bench, an internal benchmark of real engineering queries.
